## Summary

Describe the problem and the change.

## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Integration or regression tests
- [ ] Tooling tests
- [ ] Manual verification, if needed

Provide the commands and key results.

## Changelog

- [ ] Added a fragment under `changes/unreleased/`

## Docs

- [ ] Updated docs or examples if public behavior changed
- [ ] Added or updated implementation technical documentation for this workstream

## Checklist

- [ ] Read `Agent.md`
- [ ] No solver code hard-codes mesh attribute integers
- [ ] Core behavior changes include tests
- [ ] Changelog and technical docs reflect the implemented change
